item.title: About
item.description: Greetings. I’m Nur Adhyaksa, a data analyst aspirant. Right now, my focus is to build a proper portfolio covering my interests, including football, energy, and data visualization. Hopefully, I can dive in to analyze and contribute to the real-world problem soon. For my expertise, mostly I utilize Jupyter Notebook to write python and Postgres for SQL for my data analysis routine. For visualizing, I use tableau or R. This personal web would also hold my writings related to my thoughts on general things.

item.title: Looking Back at MUFC's Performance Last Season
item.description: Manchester United’s last season’s performance is unbearable to watch. At least for their supporter, including me. As a long-life fan, my bar is already set high as I’ve already witnessed the glorious era of this club. Apparently, it is too high for around these periods. The squad is in a transitional period, and they haven’t found their true shape yet. Even the manager has changed eight times since the retirement of Sir Alex, for crying out loud.
